mapper.select: SELECT i_no, i_name, i_price, i_timage, i_dimage, i_option, i_ex, s_no FROM item ORDER BY i_no DESC FETCH FIRST 8 ROWS ONLY
SELECT i_no, i_name, i_price, i_timage, i_dimage, i_option, i_ex, s_no FROM item ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(i_price, ',', '')) DESC FETCH FIRST 8 ROWS ONLY
SELECT n_no, n_title, n_write, n_nb, n_date FROM notice ORDER BY n_no DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
